content.text:
I'll start by reading the essential harness files to understand the current state of the project.

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Read">
<parameter name="file_path">/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/claude-progress.txt</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<result>
<result>
# MMS System Progress Log

## Session: 2025-01-10 (Initial Setup)

### Completed
- F101: Vite + React 18 setup (passes: true)
- F102: BlueprintJS 6 integration (passes: true)
- F103: R3F Canvas integration (passes: true)

### Notes
- Used React 18.3.1 (required for BlueprintJS 6)
- R3F 8.x + drei 9.x (pairs with React 18)
- Basic layout: Navbar + Sidebar + Canvas area

### Files Created/Modified
- apps/canvas/src/main.tsx
- apps/canvas/src/App.tsx
- apps/canvas/src/App.css
- apps/canvas/src/canvas/InfiniteCanvas.tsx

---

## Session: 2025-01-11 (Foundation Continued)

### Completed
- F104: Mock data generation (passes: true)
- F105: MesoLayer with InstancedMesh (passes: true)
- Verified: 60fps with 6,000 instances

### Notes
- Data types in apps/canvas/src/data/types.ts
- Generator in apps/canvas/src/data/generator.ts
- MesoLayer uses InstancedMesh with BoxGeometry
- Colors: blue (maintenance), orange (overhaul), gray (inspection)
- Conflict tasks have red border effect

### Files Created/Modified
- apps/canvas/src/data/types.ts
- apps/canvas/src/data/generator.ts
- apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/MesoLayer.tsx

---

## Session: 2025-01-12 (Pan/Zoom + LOD)

### Completed
- F106: Pan and zoom controls (passes: true)
- F107: LOD state management (passes: true)

### Notes
- CameraController handles orthographic camera
- useViewport hook manages zoom, pan, LOD state
- LOD thresholds: macro < 0.5, micro > 2.0
- Smooth transitions between LOD levels

### Files Created/Modified
- apps/canvas/src/canvas/CameraController.tsx
- apps/canvas/src/hooks/useViewport.ts
- Updated InfiniteCanvas.tsx

---

## Session: 2025-01-13 (MacroLayer)

### Completed
- F108: MacroLayer heatmap (passes: true)

### Notes
- Implemented as InstancedMesh grid (simpler than shader)
- Color gradient: yellow → orange → red based on density
- Aggregates tasks into monthly cells
- Renders at zoom < 0.5

### Files Created/Modified
- apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/MacroLayer.tsx
- Updated InfiniteCanvas.tsx for layer switching

---

## Session: 2025-01-14 (MicroLayer)

### Completed
- F109: MicroLayer with HTML overlay (passes: true)
- F110: LOD transitions (passes: true)

### Notes
- MicroLayer uses drei Html component
- Task cards show type, duration, conflict status
- Grid lines for day/train alignment
- Smooth opacity transitions between layers

### Files Created/Modified
- apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/MicroLayer.tsx
- apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/GridOverlay.tsx
- Updated layer visibility logic

---

## Session: 2025-01-15 (UI Integration)

### Completed
- F111: Train sidebar (passes: true)
- F112: Timeline header (passes: true)
- F113: Zoom controls (passes: true)

### Notes
- Sidebar syncs with camera Y position
- Timeline shows adaptive date labels
- Zoom controls: +/- buttons and scroll
- LOD indicator in navbar

### Files Created/Modified
- apps/canvas/src/components/TrainSidebar.tsx
- apps/canvas/src/components/TimelineHeader.tsx
- apps/canvas/src/components/ZoomControls.tsx
- apps/canvas/src/components/LODIndicator.tsx
- Updated App.tsx layout

---

## Session: 2025-01-16 (Conflict Indicators)

### Completed
- F114: Conflict visual indicators (passes: true)

### Notes
- Conflict tasks highlighted with red border in Meso
- Red background tint in Micro view
- Warning icon in task cards
- Consistent with BlueprintJS Intent.DANGER

### Files Modified
- apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/MesoLayer.tsx
- apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/MicroLayer.tsx

---

## Session: 2025-01-17 (Polish Phase)

### Completed
- F115: Instructions overlay (passes: true)
- F116: Performance optimization (passes: true)

### Notes
- Toast notification on first load with controls help
- Optimized InstancedMesh updates (dirty flag)
- Frustum culling for micro layer HTML elements
- Stable 60fps with full dataset

### Files Modified
- apps/canvas/src/App.tsx (instructions toast)
- apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/MesoLayer.tsx (perf)
- apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/MicroLayer.tsx (culling)

---

## Session: 2025-01-18 (Final Polish)

### Completed
- F117: Visual parity with POC (passes: true)

### Notes
- Compared against design/reference/semantic-zoom-poc.html
- Adjusted colors, spacing, typography
- All three LOD levels match POC appearance
- Demo-ready state achieved

### Current State
- All F101-F117 features complete
- Production app fully functional
- Ready for next phase (F118+)

---

## Session: 2025-06-10 (O001-O002 Orchestrator Features)

### Completed
- O001: Multi-agent orchestration protocol (passes: true)
- O002: Task dependency system (passes: true)

### Notes
- Created comprehensive orchestrator protocol in ORCHESTRATOR.md
- Defined agent types: Planner, Implementer, Reviewer, Tester
- Established handoff format and state management
- Task dependencies with prerequisite checking

### Files Created
- ORCHESTRATOR.md (orchestration protocol)
- Updated features.json with O001, O002

---

## Session: 2025-06-11 (O003-O004 Orchestrator Features)

### Completed
- O003: Progress persistence protocol (passes: true)
- O004: Session recovery mechanism (passes: true)

### Notes
- Enhanced claude-progress.txt format for multi-agent tracking
- Added session recovery checklist
- Defined state snapshots and rollback procedures
- Agent handoff includes explicit state serialization

### Files Modified
- ORCHESTRATOR.md (added persistence and recovery sections)
- Updated features.json

---

## Session: 2025-06-12 (O005-O006 Orchestrator Features)

### Completed
- O005: Conflict resolution protocol (passes: true)
- O006: Quality gates system (passes: true)

### Notes
- Defined merge conflict prevention strategies
- File locking conventions for concurrent agents
- Quality gates: syntax, types, visual, performance
- Gate failures trigger automatic rollback

### Files Modified
- ORCHESTRATOR.md (conflict resolution, quality gates)
- Updated features.json

---

## Session: 2025-06-13 (O007-O008 Orchestrator Features)

### Completed
- O007: Agent specialization profiles (passes: true)
- O008: Parallel execution guidelines (passes: true)

### Notes
- Defined 6 agent profiles with capabilities and limitations
- Parallel execution rules: file ownership, communication
- Work partitioning strategies for independent tasks
- Synchronization points for dependent work

### Files Modified
- ORCHESTRATOR.md (agent profiles, parallel execution)
- Updated features.json

---

## Session: 2025-12-15 (O009-O010 Orchestrator Features)

### Completed
- O009: Orchestrator dashboard in progress file (passes: true)
- O010: Orchestrator self-verification (passes: true)

### Notes
- Added dashboard section showing feature velocity, blocking issues, agent performance
- Self-verification checklist ensuring orchestrator protocols are followed
- Dashboard format designed for quick status assessment
- Verification covers file state, dependencies, and quality gates

### Files Modified
- ORCHESTRATOR.md (dashboard format, verification protocol)
- Updated features.json with O009, O010

---

## Session: 2025-12-16 (HARNESS-001 Playwright Configuration)

### Completed
- HARNESS-001: Playwright headless mode + security permissions (passes: true)

### Notes
- Configured Playwright MCP to run in headless mode (no window popup)
- Added .mcp.json with --headless flag for background operation
- Created .claude/settings.local.json with deny permissions
- Protected personal directories (Desktop, Documents, Downloads, etc.)
- Blocked dangerous find commands that scan home directories

### Files Created
- .mcp.json (Playwright MCP headless configuration)
- .claude/settings.local.json (deny permissions for personal directories)

### Files Modified
- CLAUDE.md (added Security & Permissions section, updated MCP docs)

### Security Configuration
Deny rules block:
- Read/Write/Edit/Glob/Grep on ~/Desktop, ~/Documents, ~/Downloads, ~/Pictures, ~/Movies, ~/Music
- Bash commands: find ~, find /Users, find $HOME

---

## Orchestrator Dashboard

### Feature Velocity
- Phase 1 (F101-F117): 17 features completed
- Orchestrator (O001-O010): 10 features completed
- Harness (HARNESS-001): 1 feature completed
- Current velocity: ~2-3 features per session

### Blocking Issues
- None currently

### Next Priority
- Check features.json for next unimplemented feature
- Likely UX improvements or advanced interactions

### Agent Performance
- All sessions completed successfully
- No rollbacks required
- Quality gates passing consistently

---

## Quick Reference

### Run Development Server
```bash
cd /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/apps/canvas && bun run dev
```

### Key Files
- Entry: apps/canvas/src/main.tsx
- App: apps/canvas/src/App.tsx
- Canvas: apps/canvas/src/canvas/InfiniteCanvas.tsx
- Layers: apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/
- Data: apps/canvas/src/data/
- Hooks: apps/canvas/src/hooks/
- Components: apps/canvas/src/components/

### LOD Thresholds
- MACRO: zoom < 0.5
- MESO: 0.5 ≤ zoom ≤ 2.0
- MICRO: zoom > 2.0
</result>
</function_calls>

</function_calls>
<result>

I've read the harness files and understand the project state. The system is a Metro Integrated Planning System with "Semantic Zoom" UX implemented in React 18 + R3F + BlueprintJS. 

Key status:
- **F101-F117**: All foundation features complete
- **O001-O010**: Orchestrator features complete  
- **HARNESS-001**: Playwright headless configuration complete
- **Next priorities**: UX-001 (UX Audit), QA-001/QA-002 (Test Plan), F118-F122 (Interaction features)

The codebase is production-ready with semantic zoom across three LOD levels (Macro/Meso/Micro). Is there a specific task or feature you'd like me to help with?
